### (2) Total count

**90 files** contain references to `poll_read`. Breaking down the direct code changes required:

| Category | Files | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Trait definition + blanket impls | 1 | `async_read.rs` — the root change |
| `fn poll_read` implementations | ~40 | Every `impl AsyncRead` must add the parameter |
| `.poll_read(` call sites | ~35 | Every caller must pass the new argument |
| Docs/changelogs (mentions only) | 2 | `CHANGELOG.md` files |
| Indirect mentions (no code change) | ~13 | Files that reference `poll_read` in comments/docs |

Approximately **65–70 definitions + call sites** require actual code changes across **3 crates** (`tokio`, `tokio-util`, `tokio-test`) plus benchmarks. This is also a **public API breaking change** affecting every downstream crate that implements or calls `AsyncRead::poll_read`.

|---|---|---|

| 2 | `Grep` | `pattern: "\\.poll_read\\("`, `output_mode: "content"` |
| 3 | `Grep` | `pattern: "poll_read"`, `output_mode: "files_with_matches"` |

3 tool calls total, all executed in parallel.

### (2) Total count

**90 files** contain references to `poll_read`. Breaking down the direct code changes required:

| Category | Files | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Trait definition + blanket impls | 1 | `async_read.rs` — the root change |
| `fn poll_read` implementations | ~40 | Every `impl AsyncRead` must add the parameter |
| `.poll_read(` call sites | ~35 | Every caller must pass the new argument |
| Docs/changelogs (mentions only) | 2 | `CHANGELOG.md` files |
| Indirect mentions (no code change) | ~13 | Files that reference `poll_read` in comments/docs |

Approximately **65–70 definitions + call sites** require actual code changes across **3 crates** (`tokio`, `tokio-util`, `tokio-test`) plus benchmarks. This is also a **public API breaking change** affecting every downstream crate that implements or calls `AsyncRead::poll_read`.
